description_long: This stool features a round wooden seat with a natural, textured grain pattern and a matching oval-shaped wooden backrest. The seat and backrest are supported by four slender, angled black metal legs, giving the stool a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. Two black metal supports connect the backrest to the seat, providing both structural integrity and a modern visual contrast. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments. The materials and construction suggest durability, making it suitable for urban environments such as cafes, parks, or public waiting areas. The stool's proportions are compact, making it easy to move and arrange in various settings.
description: A compact stool with a round wooden seat, oval wooden backrest, and four angled black metal legs, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round wooden seat, oval backrest, and two black metal supports connecting the backrest to the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the wooden seat and backrest, as well as the angled black metal legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the oval backrest and the two black metal supports, with all four legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the profile of the seat and backrest, emphasizing the stool's slim, modern silhouette.
